name: Benedetta
intro: Benedetta, the Shadow Ranger, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.name: Elapsed Daytime
abilities.description: Mobility Damage When holding down the Basic Attack button, Benedetta enters the Swordout state and charges up Sword Intent . If the Basic Attack button released after the Sword Intent is fully charged, Benedetta will use Swordout Slash in the direction she's facing and dash forward, dealing (+215% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage to enemies on the path (counts as Skill Damage and is reduced to 50% on Minions and Creeps) Benedetta can only use Swordout Slash when her Sword Intent is fully charged and she is in Swordout state by holding down the Basic Attack button. Benedetta also gains Sword Intent by dealing damage with her Basic Attacks and skills. Skill terms Physical Basic Attack Deal Physical Damage to enemies. Triggers ATK Effects and Lifesteal. Blink Movement ability that can pass through obstacles.

abilities.name: Phantom Slash
abilities.description: AOE Mobility Benedetta withdraws swiftly and leaves a shadow in front. After a short delay, her shadow slashes forward in a fan-shaped area, dealing 200–360 (+75% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage and slowing the enemies by 60% for 0.5 seconds. Meanwhile, Benedetta dashes forward to slash, dealing 75–175 (+100% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage . (If the target is hit by her shadow, damage caused by Benedetta herself will increase to 200% .) Skill terms Physical Damage Skill Deal Physical DMG to enemies. Triggers Spell Vamp. Blink Movement ability that can pass through obstacles.

abilities.name: An Eye for An Eye
abilities.description: Mobility Buff Benedetta raises her weapon to defend, gaining Control Immunity and blocking damage from any source for 0.8 seconds. After this, she stabs in the designated direction, dealing 300–450 (+80% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage . If Benedetta successfully fends off any damage while defending, she will gain full Sword Intent . If she fends off any control effects, her subsequent stab stuns the target for 1.5 seconds. Skill terms Control Immunity You are immune to enemy CC effects (Suppressed excluded) within the duration. Movement Speed Movement Speed on the battlefield. Usually Calculated and Actual Movement Speed is equal. But when Movement Speed is below 230 or over 420 both Slowdown and Speedup Effect will decay. Calculated Movement Speed = Basic Movement Speed × (100% + All Speedup Effect% - All Slowdown Effect%). Blink Movement ability that can pass through obstacles.

abilities.name: Alecto: Final Blow
abilities.description: Burst Mobility | Spell Vamp Ratio: 25% Benedetta clenches Alecto, dashes forward (Benedetta is untargetable during the dash), and performs a slash after a short delay, [ duration needed ] detonating the Sword Intent along the path. For 2.5 seconds, the Sword Intent deals up to a total of 1560–2080 (+1105% Extra Physical Attack) Physical Damage to enemies within and slows them by 50%. Skill terms Untargetable You are immune to enemy damage effects within the duration. It doesn't remove any existing damage effects or damage over time. Movement Speed Movement Speed on the battlefield. Usually Calculated and Actual Movement Speed is equal. But when Movement Speed is below 230 or over 420 both Slowdown and Speedup Effect will decay. Calculated Movement Speed = Basic Movement Speed × (100% + All Speedup Effect% - All Slowdown Effect%). Blink Movement ability that can pass through obstacles.
